data.title: Equinor and Shell Unite Forces to Dominate UK North Sea Oil and Gas
data.description: Equinor and Shell to merge UK offshore oil and gas assets, create largest independent producer in UK North Sea, aiming to enhance production and energy security.

data.title: How Leveraged MicroStrategy ETFs Are Powering The Bitcoin Surge
data.description: MicroStrategy Inc's (NASDAQ:MSTR) leveraged ETFs have amplified the company’s role as a de facto Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) proxy.
